markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.013 — Use of Preferential Lane by Motorcycle

A motorcycle, including a motorcycle described by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a), may be operated in a preferential lane that is not closed to all vehicular traffic.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 1391 (S.B.1967), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: A motorcycle, including a motorcycle described by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a), may be operated in a preferential lane that is not closed to all vehicular traffic.
